monthly_prompts.text: What is your 'word' for this year, and why does it resonate with your soul right now?
How can you show extra kindness to yourself today? Write a love letter from God to you.
Spring is coming. What 'seeds' of hope are you planting in your heart this season?
Look for the small miracles today. What made you pause and say 'Thank You'?
Bloom where you are planted. What is one area of your life where you feel God's growth?
Mid-year check-in: What has been your favorite memory with the Creator so far?
Summer rest. Where do you find the most peace when the world feels loud?
Harvesting gratitude. What are three things you're grateful for in this current season?
New beginnings. What is one habit you want to start to deepen your prayer life?
Falling leaves, rising prayers. What is something you need to 'let go' of to move forward?
A heart of thanks. Who is someone you can reach out to today with a blessing?
The gift of presence. How can you find moments of stillness in the holiday rush?

bundle_description: Grab any 3 devotionals and get a free sticker sheet of your choice.
